## Safety checklist

- [ ] I removed access tokens, refresh tokens, client secrets, authorization codes, encryption keys, cookies, stream URLs, manifest URLs, and segment URLs.
- [ ] I am not requesting DRM bypass, protected-stream decryption, token scraping, or credential extraction.
